mapper.select: SELECT * FROM owner ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM owner WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO owner (name, phone, address, remark) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE owner SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM owner ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT * FROM owner WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM owner WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
